hire.heading: A founding engineer for hire in India — without the cost of a team.
hire.intro: Most early-stage founders need one senior engineer who can ship the whole stack: AI, backend, mobile, infra, and the awkward integrations in between. That is exactly the gap a founding engineer for hire in India closes — at 30–40% of the cost of a US contractor and with daily timezone overlap on Slack or WhatsApp.
points: Senior full-stack + AI engineer, based in Pune, India — shipping to startups worldwide.
End-to-end ownership: backend, frontend, mobile, infra, observability, deployment.
Production AI MVP live in 6 weeks; first commit pushed to your GitHub on day 5.
You own the code, the IP, and the repo from week 1 — MIT or commercial license.

hero.subtitle: Founding engineer for hire in India — ships end-to-end on any stack (AI, backend, mobile, blockchain, iOS, web3) without the cost of a team.

process.heading: How a 6-week MVP sprint works
process.subtitle: Fixed scope. Daily Slack. First production commit by day 5.

items.q: Why hire a founding engineer for hire in India over a US contractor?
items.a: A senior founding engineer for hire in India ships the same production AI MVP at 30–40% of US contractor cost, with full code ownership and daily timezone overlap on Slack/WhatsApp. You get end-to-end execution — backend, frontend, mobile, infra, AI — from one person who has shipped 29 products.

items.q: How fast can a founding engineer in India ship my AI MVP?
items.a: First production commit on day 5, fully-live MVP at week 6 — fixed scope, fixed timeline, no "agency surprise". Every project on rohitraj.tech follows this 6-week shipping cadence.
Fixed scope means we descope features, not extend timeline. You ship on week 6, even if a few stretch features move to v2. You keep what's working.
You. Full repo handover on week 6. MIT license by default; commercial-only if you prefer. All IP transfers on final payment.

items.q: Am I locked into your tech stack?
items.a: No. I default to Next.js / Spring Boot / Postgres because they're boring and hireable. If your team uses Python / Go / Rails, we ship in your stack.
Two options: (1) clean handoff to your team with full docs and a runbook, or (2) ongoing retainer at a fixed monthly rate. No surprise bills either way.
Yes. No outsourcing, no rotating contractors. You talk to me on Slack / WhatsApp daily. If I get overcommitted I tell you upfront.

items.q: Are you open to long-term collaboration?
items.a: Yes. Most work starts as a focused sprint, then can continue as a retainer, advisory role, or deeper technical partnership if the product and team are a strong fit.
Standard mutual NDA before kickoff if you want one. All code IP transfers to you on final payment, signed in the master services agreement.
